positive: A stylized, symmetrical cosmic forest silhouette. The central scene features towering, stylized trees with bioluminescent leaves, set against a deep indigo and midnight blue nebula background. Incorporate glowing geometric patterns like mandalas and orrery gears subtly integrated into the foliage. The style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau and Neo-Geomancy, utilizing clean, crisp outlines and high contrast. Lighting should come primarily from the glowing flora, creating a deep, moody contrast against the dark sky. Color palette focus: Teal, deep sapphire blue, luminous violet, and ethereal gold accents. Perfect for a central, highly detailed apparel print.
negative: blur, artifact, text, watermark, logo, signature, poor composition, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low resolution, noisy, jpeg artifacts, graffiti, busy clutter, photorealism, grainy
